public Task NotifyAsync(
    bool sendErrorEmail,
    bool logError,
    string logErrorTitle,
    string logErrorProcessName,
    string errorEmailBody,
    string errorEmailSubject,
    string senderConfigKey,
    string recipientConfigKey,
    string logErrorFormattedError,
    string logType,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    return Task.CompletedTask;
}
